spec_match.rationale: Accurately exposes the difference between old isFallbackAdapter and adapter.info.adapterType, demonstrating it live with your browser's actual WebGPU adapter characteristics if available.

interactive.rationale: Exposes a live WebGPU adapter inspector AND a functional client-side code static analyzer that parses inputted code, highlights deprecated usages, and suggests drop-in code fixes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the main index blurb, showing a side-by-side comparison and a migration checker.

edge_cases.rationale: Implements strict support checks for WebGPU availability, handles cases where adapter.info is not yet populated, and escapes HTML correctly inside the analyzer to prevent XSS.

references.rationale: The `see also` section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/4870179714236416 directly.

design_system.rationale: Excellent responsive grid layouts, custom color states (rose for deprecated, emerald for recommended), and proper contrast.

summary: A top-tier migration helper combining live device checks with a useful client-side code parser, only flawed by pointing to an incorrect ChromeStatus ID.
